name: Gai Tom Kha- Chicken and Galanga Soup.
recipeInstructions:
1. Either use canned coconut milk or grate fresh coconut and simmer with hot water to make the required amount of coconut milk (2-1/4 pounds grated coconut + 7 cups hot water).
2. Debone the chicken and cut the meat into bite-sized pieces. Cut the bones into chunks.
3. Simmer the chicken bones in coconut milk over low to medium heat for approximately 30 minutes.
4. Remove the bones, add the chicken meat and sliced galanga.
5. Place the lid back on the pot and continue simmering over low heat for another 20 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and season to taste with fish sauce, lime juice, and sugar.
7. Serve with chopped cilantro and crushed hot peppers sprinkled on top.
